subject: 1h project sync this week?
body: Could we grab an hour this week for a project sync to walk through the roadmap?

subject: Re: Q3 budget review
body: Can you confirm the marketing line item by Friday? Finance needs the final number.

subject: Review my slides before Thursday?
body: I've finished the pitch deck. Could you review it and send comments before the rehearsal?

subject: Re: onboarding checklist
body: Can you confirm whether the new hire starts Monday or Tuesday? I need to book the laptop.

subject: Can you approve the PTO request?
body: I'd like to take Thursday and Friday off next week. Can you approve, and who will cover support?

subject: Re: vendor renewal
body: The vendor offered a 10% discount if we renew by month-end. Should we take it or renegotiate?
